calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2002 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2002 Continued To Dec-17-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor Compromise
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. David R. Shane, Esq. appeared on behalf of the plaintiff. The court waives minor's presence. The Court grants settlement as follows: Settlement: $171,500.00; Costs: $6,262.80; Attorney fees: $36,352.18 and the net balance of $128,885.02 into a blocked account until the minor reaches the age of majority. The court permits plaintiff to withdraw funds from the blocked account for payment of medical bills. Counsel to prepare order for court's signature.
